---
title: "Pmetrics"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Pmetrics}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

**Thank you for your interest** in Pmetrics! 

Please visit the [online book](https://lapkb.github.io/PM_tutorial/) to learn more about the package and its functions.

You can also view the source code and report issues on [GitHub](https://github.com/LAPKB/Pmetrics/).
